prompt: A realistic indoor selfie-style portrait of a young East Asian man from the chest up, seated near a large modern window in a high-rise apartment or hotel room during soft daylight. He has black hair, thick and slightly tousled with a center part and soft volume over the forehead and sides. His build appears slim, with a long neck and smooth light skin. He wears a black button-up shirt made of matte cotton or poplin, slightly oversized, with the top several buttons undone to create a deep open collar and relaxed, casual styling. The camera is held close in a natural selfie angle, portrait orientation, framing the shoulders, chest, neck, and head. His face is fully obscured by a large centered rectangular blur or mosaic censor block, while the ears, jawline edges, neck, and hair remain visible. The mood is understated, moody, and elegant, with muted neutral colors, soft window light from the right side, gentle shadows, and a candid social-media selfie feeling. Background details include 1 beige wall section on the left, 1 small dark wall control panel, 1 vertical metallic trim or lamp edge, and 2 tall dark-framed window panels on the right with a faint out-of-focus city skyline outside. Photorealistic smartphone photo, clean modern interior, shallow depth of field, natural skin texture, subtle contrast, no smile visible because of the censor block, minimal editing, stylish and believable personal selfie.
